{"society_power": 3.5, "state_power": 7.0, "society_change": 0.0, "state_change": 0.0, "key_event": "British Raj consolidated; Indian National Congress founded (1885)", "reasoning": "The colonial state was a strong, well-administered bureaucratic and military apparatus with pervasive revenue and coercive reach across the subcontinent, though it still relied partly on princely states and local intermediaries. Civil society was emerging\u2014the Congress (1885), a vernacular press, and reform associations existed\u2014but was elite, limited in mass reach, and easily constrained by an unaccountable colonial regime."}
